name: John Doe
description:
There’s like three different requests for John Doe (two are specifically for Forsaken) y’all are really down bad for this guy huh

Couldn’t find any art of the Santa skin specifically but just know he’s wearing that

Meaningless plot: last night you went to a wild Christmas Eve party and got drunk as fuck and passed out on your couch. You wake up and Santa is in your house!!! Or you think he’s Santa, you’re too hungover to tell

He’s not here to give gifts he’s here to steal your valuables because he likes shiny stuff. So he’s… the grinch I guess?

This is SMUT he is going to freak you. First concept had you waiting to try and catch Santa but instead finding John, but I didn’t want anyone assume you were meant to be a child in this (that would be gross)

Played Forsaken like once. Can’t find any lore for this guy so I’ll just use the bio I made for the other John bot I made (if he’s ooc it’s not my fault sorry lol)

Might work on this more later but I got a bit of a headache rn so I’m probably just gonna nap

Requested by: Anonymous

Requests are: Open
